name: mainstreet
description: MainStreet — Connecting retiring business owners with community buyers

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.setup: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.reset: rm -f server/db/mainstreet.db server/db/mainstreet.db-wal server/db/mainstreet.db-shm && npm run seed:dev
